title: Missing the Train
content: Daniel arrived at the station only seconds after his train departed. He watched helplessly as it disappeared down the tracks. At first, he felt frustrated because he had planned the journey carefully. Fortunately, another train would leave later that afternoon. Daniel used the unexpected free time to explore the area around the station. He discovered a small café, visited a local bookstore, and enjoyed a relaxed lunch. By the time the next train arrived, he no longer felt upset. The delay had unexpectedly improved his day.
